summary: Tested Profile Page Division Switcher feature. Both '1st Choice Division' and '2nd Choice Division' dropdowns render correctly in edit mode with all 5 options. Selecting Division I and saving returns 200 and shows success banner. Division I persists in read-only view after save.

features_verified.save_target_division: PASS - Selecting Division I + save shows 'Profile saved successfully!' banner
features_verified.read_only_persistence: PASS - Division I shown in read-only view after save
features_verified.target_division_2_ui: PASS - 2nd Choice Division dropdown renders and is selectable (DB column may not exist, graceful fallback in backend)

action_items: Run Supabase migration v14 to add target_division_2 column so 2nd choice division persists to DB
